 7 Gemar. Sanhedr. f. 91, &c.

 1 Hyde, de Rel. Vet. Pers. p. 245, 401, &c.
2 Yet they say the dog of the seven sleepers, and Ezra's ass, which was
raised to life, will, by peculiar favour, be admitted into paradise. See Kor.
c. 18, and c. 3.
